title: Finalize cleanup status and declare template adoption exemption
outOfScope: new governance behavior and unrelated policy changes

sources.reason: Fresh-clone CI must not reference ignored local Work Items.
Template maintenance repositories require an explicit adoption-readiness exemption.

riskAssessment.reason: Repair tracked status and make template semantics explicit.

executionDecision.reason: User confirmed status repair, cleanup closure, and template exemption.

preReviewWarnings: Review fresh-clone status consistency and exemption scope.
acceptance: Committed Cockpit status represents no active Work Item in a fresh clone.
Template repositories are explicitly exempt from project adoption readiness without weakening adopted-project checks.
The cleanup Work Item is completed and archived with valid evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The committed generated status referenced an ignored local Work Item and adoption readiness treated the template as an adopted project.
constraints: Do not alter archived security evidence except as already validated.
intent.rationale: Separate template maintenance semantics from adoption readiness and leave committed checkouts self-consistent.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: template exemption does not bypass adopted project readiness

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized status repair and template adoption exemption.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and regenerate Cockpit status.
